findings.fix_prompt:
Remove the "Dev Bypass (Skip Login)" button, the "Choose Your Dev Role"
modal, and all "For development purposes only" copy from Sparkle Marketplace's
sign-in page. Only show these when import.meta.env.DEV is true. Never on the
published lovable.app URL.
findings.title: Dev login bypass visible on Sparkle's sign-in page
findings.what_we_saw:
On Sparkle Marketplace's sign-in page, a "Dev Bypass (Skip Login)" button
opens a role picker and signs visitors in without credentials. Helper copy
reads "For development purposes only."
findings.why_it_matters: Anyone with your Sparkle URL can skip authentication on a marketplace app.

findings.fix_prompt:
Remove the "Developer Tools" / "Development Data Seeder" section from
Sparkle's signed-in homepage. Gate the Seed and Clear data buttons behind
import.meta.env.DEV only.
findings.title: Developer Tools panel on Sparkle's homepage
findings.what_we_saw:
After sign-in, Sparkle Marketplace's homepage shows a "Developer Tools" card
with "Seed Sample Data" and "Clear My Data" buttons.
findings.why_it_matters: First-time visitors will think Sparkle is unfinished and bounce.

findings.fix_prompt:
Add privacy and terms routes with basic policy content for Sparkle Marketplace.
Link both from the footer on every page. Use your real support email in the
contact section. Match the rest of Sparkle's typography and spacing.
findings.title: Sparkle's privacy and terms pages return 404
findings.what_we_saw:
Sparkle Marketplace's footer links to privacy and terms pages, but both
URLs return the custom 404 page.
findings.why_it_matters:
Sparkle Marketplace collects booking and account data. Visitors and payment
tools both expect legal pages.

findings.fix_prompt:
Fix Quick Book on Sparkle Marketplace so available slots appear, OR hide
Quick Book when no slots exist and show "No dates available yet, check back soon."
findings.title: Sparkle's Quick Book modal dead-ends with no slots
findings.what_we_saw:
Sparkle's headline "Quick Book" CTA opens a modal whose time-slot picker
shows "No available slots found" and the "Book Now" button stays disabled.
findings.why_it_matters:
The single most prominent booking CTA on Sparkle Marketplace bounces every
visitor who tries to book.

findings.fix_prompt:
On Sparkle listing cards, when the review count is 0, show "New" or "No reviews
yet" instead of a numeric rating. Only show the star number once at least one
real review exists.
findings.title: Sparkle listings show 4.5 stars with (0) reviews
findings.what_we_saw:
Sparkle Marketplace experience cards display "4.5 (0)", a numeric rating
with zero reviews.
findings.why_it_matters: Reads like seeded test data, which kills trust on Sparkle's marketplace.

findings.fix_prompt:
On Sparkle Marketplace, replace "Hosted by Local Host" with each experience's
actual host display name from the database. If missing, show first name + last
initial or hide the line.
findings.title: Every Sparkle listing says "Hosted by Local Host"
findings.what_we_saw:
Every Sparkle Marketplace experience card shows "Hosted by Local Host" instead
of a real host name.
findings.why_it_matters: Reads as placeholder data on a public marketplace.

findings.fix_prompt:
Add a 1200x630 og.png to Sparkle Marketplace's /public, set og:image and
twitter:image meta tags in index.html to /og.png. Verify with opengraph.xyz
after deploy.
findings.title: Sparkle has no share preview image
findings.what_we_saw:
Sparkle Marketplace's og:image is unset, so Slack and iMessage previews show
a blank card when someone shares the app URL.
findings.why_it_matters: First impression when someone shares Sparkle is blank, not branded.

passed_checks: Mobile layout on Sparkle's listing and booking screens
Search, auth, and listing detail work aside from the dev-only UI
No other obvious launch blockers beyond the findings below

share_metadata.description: Pre-launch audit for Sparkle Marketplace. Verdict: Needs fixes before launch. 7 findings across trust, broken CTAs, and booking flow.
share_metadata.title: LaunchLook audit for Sparkle Marketplace

verdict.label: Needs fixes before launch
verdict.narrative:
Sparkle Marketplace looks polished at first glance: custom branding, booking
flow, search, and auth. Two dev-only features are still visible on the live URL,
and the headline booking CTA dead-ends. Fix the critical items before sharing
Sparkle outside your test circle. Everything else is polish you can pace through
this week.
verdict.summary: Two dev-only blockers and a dead-end booking CTA to clear before any wider share of Sparkle Marketplace.
